name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
description: Income support of ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments to all landholding farmer families.

name: Karshaka Pension (Kerala)
description: Monthly pension for farmers who are 60 years or older and have cultivated for at least 10 years.
eligibility: Small and marginal farmers in Kerala, annual income below threshold.
applyLink: Apply through local Krishi Bhavan or Akshaya Centers.

name: Post-Matric Scholarship
description: Financial assistance to students from SC/ST/OBC communities pursuing higher education.
eligibility: Students belonging to reserved categories with family income below 2.5 LPA.

name: E-Grantz 3.0 (Kerala)
description: Educational assistance for SC, ST, OBC, and economically backward students in Kerala.
eligibility: Students studying at post-matric level in recognized institutions in Kerala.

name: Startup India Initiative
description: Support for startups including tax benefits, funding, and simplified compliance.

name: K-DISC One Local Government One Idea
description: Encouraging innovation at the local level through micro-enterprises.
eligibility: Self-help groups and entrepreneurs in Kerala.
applyLink: Contact local Grama Panchayat or K-DISC regional office.
